classObjective: Find the coordinates of a point that divides a segment in a given ratio on a coordinate plane.
workedExamples: 10-6, Example 1 — Find a Point at a Fractional Distance in the Coordinate Plane
10-6, Example 2 — Find a Point That Divides a Segment in a Given Ratio
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: section formula on the coordinate plane; weighted averages; extending number line partitioning to 2D
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice finding points dividing segments in given ratios on the coordinate plane
independentPractice: Practice problems applying the section formula to find points at fractional distances in 2D
assessment: Exit ticket: find the point that divides the segment from (1, 2) to (9, 8) in the ratio 1:3
capReflection: How does the section formula extend the midpoint formula for non-1:1 ratios in the coordinate plane?
